message:
🐛 Fix GitOps dashboard caching - don't reset to 0 on refresh

On refresh, collect all releases and replace at once to avoid:
- Duplicates from appending to existing releases
- Stats resetting to 0 during fetch

Progressive loading still works on initial load for better UX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
